shopping_432.POSSIBLE REASONS FOR FAILURE:
1. The initial search term "phone charger" was too broad and did not specifically target the unique visual characteristics of the item (pink, round, magic circle design, wireless).
2. The agent did not utilize any price filtering options available on the search results page, leading to inefficient browsing of items outside the specified $30-$40 range.
3. The agent failed to visually identify the distinct "magic circle" design of the charger in the objective image among the generic phone chargers and accessories.
shopping_432.REFLECTION: For future attempts, start with a more specific search query that includes visual descriptors, such as "magic circle wireless charger," "pink wireless charger," or "Qi wireless charging pad." Immediately apply price filters to narrow down results to the $30-$40 range. Prioritize visual matching of the unique design from the objective image when scanning search results.
